product_model.identity: SITE-AGNOSTIC autonomous data bridge. Coach picks prior service in TGP mobile → browser opens that site → after coach login, extension prompts Start client Import? → extension autonomously flips through many pages capturing JSON → posts to TGP scout ingest. Extension ships with the app by default.
product_model.not_this: Not a thin v0.1 TrueCoach-only stub. Not per-site hard-mapped tooling as the product core. Not server-side credential scraping.
product_model.launch_bar: v0.3 — full autonomous multi-page import loop. No half-launch.
flow: 1. User downloads TGP (extension included by default with the app)
4. Opens that site in browser; coach logs in with their own session
5. TGP extension popup: Start client Import?
6. Autonomous multi-page crawl — extension flips through pages and captures JSON as it loads
7. Envelopes to /api/scout/ingest; progress to mobile; complete settles import

r3_process_incidents.summary: PR #5 was landed via GitHub-generated squash merge. GitHub synthesized the merge commit identity: author BradleyGleavePortfolio <bradleyapple1031@gmail.com>, committer GitHub <noreply@github.com>. This does NOT satisfy R3 (both author AND committer must be Bradley Gleave <bradley@bradleytgpcoaching.com>).
r3_process_incidents.product_tree_status: ACCEPTED — audited tree at 5d46a1b is CLEAN/CLEAN; only the commit-envelope identity metadata is non-conforming.
r3_process_incidents.remediation_considered: A metadata-only rewrite candidate (byte-identical tree/parent/message/dates, identity corrected to Bradley Gleave) was built and fully verified locally.
r3_process_incidents.remediation_decision: NOT PUSHED. Force-pushing a rewrite over already-published shared main is a destructive provenance-altering operation and was deliberately declined. origin/main remains 5eabeec (unchanged). The candidate object is unreferenced and will be garbage-collected.
r3_process_incidents.honesty_note: This incident is recorded as an OPEN, ACCEPTED landmine. It is NOT hidden and NOT silently fixed. The published 5eabeec commit retains its GitHub-synthesized identity.
r3_process_incidents.prospective_fix: See merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14 — future TGP merges use a manual identity-safe squash so R3 identity is correct at creation time, never requiring a published-history rewrite.

merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.trigger: R3-INC-1 — GitHub-generated squash stamps a non-Bradley author/committer identity that R3 forbids, and correcting it after publish would require a destructive force-push over shared main.
merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.old_procedure: Agent used GitHub squash-merge (UI/API) after dual-lens CLEAN + CI green (R138).
merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.new_procedure: Do NOT use GitHub-generated squash for future TGP merges. Instead: (1) build a local/manual squash commit whose tree is exactly the audited exact-head tree, with BOTH author and committer set to Bradley Gleave <bradley@bradleytgpcoaching.com>; (2) lease-safe fast-forward main to that commit (--force-with-lease pinned to the known base, aborts on divergence — fast-forward only, no history rewrite); (3) close the PR referencing the landed commit.
merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.scope: Applies to extension, backend, and mobile TGP repos going forward. Prior grandfathered history (including 5eabeec) is NOT rewritten.
merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.supersedes_note: Refines R138 autonomy: merge remains agent-permitted after dual-lens CLEAN + CI green, but the mechanism changes from GitHub squash to identity-safe manual squash + lease-safe fast-forward.

open_prs.blocking_findings: CONVERGENT P2 (BOTH lenses, independently): shipping Start Import CTA (popup.js:74) sends {kind,url} with NO sourceToken -> makeSourceFetch('') emits no Authorization header, so a real CTA-initiated crawl cannot authenticate against the bearer-gated TrueCoach proxy API (background bearer plumbing correct + e2e-tested with injected token; UI token producer missing). Lens A also A-02 (P3) completeIngest lacks res.ok check so a non-2xx /complete still broadcasts ingest_succeeded (pre-existing, now in the success blast radius), A-03 (P3) source 5xx low-signal 'import failed'. Lens B also P3: partial crawl reported as ingest_succeeded (drops the engine's honest partial/degraded signal); TGP-side auth loss throws plain Error('auth_required') not AuthLostError so the terminal status/text is muddled/order-dependent; single-flight covers start_import only, not the legacy start_ingest path. Lens B advisory: ratio 2.010 sits only 3 lines above the 2.0 floor.

open_prs.title: feat(import): live extension pairing (mint+poll), default-off (PR-M2)
open_prs.head: 10414c4
open_prs.fixer_status: r1 COMPLETE @10414c4 (prior builder head bd9a41a) — both convergent dual-lens r1 P0s resolved (the two TEST-ONLY R75 banned-cast net-new additions swapped for allowed forms) + Lens A P3-1 resolved (R100 Self-Check heading added to PR body). Full jest 295 suites/3562 tests, CI + CodeQL green, prod unchanged (<=400), ratio>=2 (no test-trimming), R3 clean (author==committer Bradley Gleave). Dual-lens r2 IN PROGRESS at 10414c4.
files_behavior: src/api/extensionPairApi.ts (new) — typed transport for the two mobile-callable endpoints
src/screens/coach/ImportDataScreen.tsx (mod) — mounts the panel in awaitingExtension
open_prs.behavior: Replaces the M1 awaitingExtension static placeholder with a real, default-OFF pairing surface. On entry auto-mints a pairing code (POST /extension/pair/init), shows it with a server-authoritative countdown, and polls (POST /extension/pair/status) to the paired/expired terminal. Resilient polling (bounded exponential backoff 2s->15s x1.5, <=5 consecutive transient errors before retryable failed); AppState pause on background / resume-or-expire on foreground; server-authoritative expiry; single-flight mint with cancel-mid-mint abort; full timer teardown on unmount; fails closed (unknown/garbled/malformed status never promoted to paired; 401/403 -> authExpired; 404 -> unavailable). Flag OFF => hook idle, zero network.
open_prs.honesty_guardrails: No mobile-readable progress endpoint exists -> truthful terminal is 'paired' ('running in the extension'); never renders importing/partial/complete or any page/entity count/percentage. No server cancel endpoint -> cancel is a local abandon. PII-free telemetry: platform slug + coarse failure-reason class only, never a code/token/URL.
open_prs.contract_mapping: Brief-named endpoints do not exist; real verified mobile-callable routes: POST /api/extension/pair/init (mint {pairing_code, expires_at}) and POST /api/extension/pair/status (body-only; {status: pending|paired|expired}). No mobile-readable scout/ingest progress route exists (scout/* is extension-only).
open_prs.gates: Builder-claimed: tsc clean, ESLint 0 errors, 295 suites/3562 tests, prod 396, ratio 2.23. Lens B INDEPENDENTLY RE-RAN at bd9a41a (clean npm ci): tsc --noEmit exit 0; ESLint 0 errors (75 pre-existing warnings, 0 in PR files); full jest 295/295 suites, 3562/3562 tests, exit 0; prod SLOC added 400/400 (R76 PASS, conservative upper bound); test:prod ratio 882/400=2.21 (R74 PASS); feature flag default OFF (no off-path network); R3 clean (single commit, author==committer Bradley Gleave, no AI tokens). Until then the mobile terminal is honestly 'paired'.

audit_rounds.head: ab5dc61
audit_rounds.lens_b: FAIL P0=0 P1=0 P2=1 P3=3 (+1 advisory)
audit_rounds.gate_local: prod 303/400, test:src ratio 2.010, 467 tests, banned clean, R3 clean
audit_rounds.lens_a_findings: All MANDATORY controls independently re-verified and HOLD (trust gate rejects content-script sender; synchronous single-flight; tab-origin allowedOrigins enforced by normalizeBlueprint inside runReplay BEFORE any fetch; source 401/403 AuthLostError fails closed without clearing TGP tokens; bearer threaded at orchestration layer). BLOCKING A-01 (P2): shipping Start Import CTA never supplies sourceToken (requestStartImport sends only {kind,url}), so makeSourceFetch('') emits no Authorization header and a real CTA-initiated crawl cannot authenticate against a bearer-gated source — the PR-C1b bearer MANDATE is met at the background layer (e2e-tested with injected token) but the UI token producer is missing; either plumb the captured source bearer into the CTA or document+flag the deferral. A-02 (P3): completeIngest (pre-existing, now in success-path blast radius) does not check res.ok, so a non-2xx complete still broadcasts ingest_succeeded. A-03 (P3): source 5xx surfaces as low-signal 'import failed' (status code dropped); credentials:'include' is intended session reuse bounded by allowedOrigins (informational).
audit_rounds.lens_b_findings: Independent read-only lens; did NOT read Lens A. All security invariants independently re-verified PASS (trusted-page gate requires id + no-tab + chrome-extension URL, rejects content-script sender; SSRF confined by REQUIRED allowedOrigins normalized before any fetch + HARDCODED apiBase so a look-alike host cannot swap origin, root-relative templates; synchronous single-flight in the router; source AuthLostError never calls clearTokens(); LOCKED camelCase envelope; data-only blueprint fresh per resolve). BLOCKING PR6-B-P2-cta-omits-source-bearer (P2): the sole production producer of start_import (popup.js:74) sends {kind,url} with NO sourceToken, so makeSourceFetch('') emits no Authorization header and a real CTA click against the sole registered platform (bearer-gated TrueCoach) 401s -> AuthLostError -> imports nothing; the 'bearer end-to-end' claim is proven only under test injection. Fails closed (honest) => P2 not P1. INDEPENDENTLY CONVERGENT with Lens A A-01. P3s: (1) partial-reported-as-succeeded — handleStartImport collapses result.status complete||partial both to ingest_succeeded, discarding the engine's honest partial/degraded/truncated signal (silent data loss shown as unqualified success); (2) tgp-authloss-status-muddle — makeSender throws plain Error('auth_required') not AuthLostError, so a TGP-side auth loss lands in the catch as detail 'auth_required' and overwrites the friendlier onAuthLost broadcast in an order-dependent way; (3) single-flight-only-start_import — importInFlight guards start_import only, not the legacy start_ingest path, so start_ingest can run concurrently. ADVISORY (not scored): ratio 2.010 sits only 3 lines above the R74 floor of 2.0 — a fixer round must not trim tests / add trivial prod. R3 clean at ab5dc61 (author+committer Bradley Gleave, no AI/co-author/noreply trailers).
audit_rounds.note: Builder complete (resolver seam + data-only blueprint adapter + background start_import orchestration + Start Import popup CTA; security controls isTrustedExtensionPage gate / single-flight / tab-origin allowedOrigins / bearer end-to-end / AuthLostError 401/403 no-token-clear). Dual-lens r1 RETURNED = FAIL/FAIL, CONVERGENT on the CTA source-bearer P2 (Lens A A-01 == Lens B PR6-B-P2, independently found). All MANDATORY security invariants HOLD by both lenses (no P0/P1). NOT merge-ready — return to fixer for the blocking CTA source-bearer P2 (plumb the captured source bearer into the CTA message, OR document+flag the deferral and soften the 'bearer end-to-end' PR claim), plus the P3s (Lens A: completeIngest res.ok, source-5xx signal; Lens B: partial->succeeded fidelity, TGP-authloss classification, single-flight scope), then re-audit BOTH lenses at the new exact fixer head. On CLEAN/CLEAN + CI green, land via identity-safe manual squash (never GitHub squash). RESOLUTION: fixer r1 landed @55f24d5 (all six root-fixed + adversarial tests); dual-lens r2 PENDING at that head.

audit_rounds.findings: Zero P0-P3 in either lens. All six r1 findings root-fixed and re-verified by direct diff inspection at 55f24d5: (r1-P2 CTA source-bearer) collectSourceToken(tabId, allowedOrigins) re-reads live tab origin + requires it in allowlist + queries trusted content collector (wireCollector sender.id gate), accepts only {ok:true,token}, token memory-only (never DOM/storage/logs/telemetry/PR/payload), fails closed on nav/missing script; (r1-P3) completeIngest throws complete N on non-2xx + complete_timeout on bounded timeout; (r1-P3) engine lastSkipStatus preserves status-number/category only (no body/PII) surfaced via failDetail/partialDetail; (r1-P3) partial maps to distinct ingest_partial (amber), not ingest_succeeded; (r1-P3) TGP double-401 -> tgpAuthLost+clearTokens (pairing) vs SOURCE 401/403 -> AuthLostError WITHOUT clearTokens (source re-login) — two distinct fail-closed paths; (r1-P3) importInFlight set synchronously in router, shared across start_import + legacy start_ingest. SSRF confined by REQUIRED https allowedOrigins; sender trust via isTrustedExtensionPage (id + extension-origin URL + no tab); fresh blueprint per run; VERBATIM entity envelope.

fixer_rounds.head: 55f24d5
fixer_rounds.result: All six dual-lens r1 findings root-fixed (convergent P2 + five P3s): real ephemeral non-persistent trusted-tab source-bearer handoff (popup passes tabId; background collectSourceToken validates tabId + chrome.tabs.get live-origin in allowlist + messages the trusted content script, accepts only {ok:true,token}, token never in DOM/telemetry/storage/logs/PR/payload, fails closed); completeIngest throws on non-2xx (no success without backend ack); source 5xx preserved as status/category via engine lastSkipStatus (no body/PII); partial/degraded/truncated surfaced distinctly (ingest_partial + amber popup style); TGP auth-loss unified to one terminal state (tgpAuthLost/isTgpAuthLost); synchronous single-flight shared across start_import + legacy start_ingest incl. races. Adversarial tests added for every fix. Recovered in the SAME sandbox after the fixer subagent hit a step limit with an empty response (no reset/reclone, no new branch, no duplicate lane). Gates prod 398/400, ratio 2.781, 489 tests, banned clean, R3 clean (author+committer both Bradley Gleave). Dual-lens r2 @55f24d5 = CLEAN/CLEAN CONVERGENT (Lens A + Lens B + combined EXT-PR6-R2-LIVE.55f24d5.md); CI green; R124 both-ways verified; identity-safe integration now IN PROGRESS. Not self-audited.

h4_production_readiness_discovery_2026_0.trigger: Investigated the operator's likely 'H jobs' — GitHub H4 production-readiness suite.
h4_production_readiness_discovery_2026_0.finding: H4 production-readiness suite is the likely referent. Umbrella backend PR #457 was CLOSED UNMERGED; its components landed piecemeal: #458 merged, and #460-#466 merged. The current suite scans the BACKEND src only.
h4_production_readiness_discovery_2026_0.safety_assessment: Running it is SAFE: read-only, operates in a tmpdir, and can run in parallel without mutating product repos. It is NOT cross-repo coverage today (backend-only).
h4_production_readiness_discovery_2026_0.cross_repo_rollout: SAFE WITH CONDITIONS. A cross-repo rollout should SERIALIZE per repo and run AFTER the active importer PRs land, to avoid package.json / workflow / test-ownership conflicts with in-flight importer work.
h4_production_readiness_discovery_2026_0.decision: Do NOT start or run H4 now, and do NOT modify any product repo for it. Record only. Revisit cross-repo rollout (serialized, per-repo) once EXT-C1b PR #6 and Mobile M2 PR #285 are merged.
h4_production_readiness_discovery_2026_0.constraints_observed: This note is documentation only; no H4 execution, no product-repo edits performed.
